context7.description: Up-to-date library docs injected into context. Add 'use context7' to any prompt, or 'use library /org/repo' for a specific lib.

next-devtools.description: Official Vercel Next.js MCP — runtime errors, dev server logs, page metadata, routes, Server Actions. IMPORTANT: call the 'init' tool at the start of every session.

shadcn.description: Official shadcn/ui MCP — browse, search, and install components from the shadcn registry or any configured registry in components.json. Use natural language: 'Add a login form using shadcn components'.

playwright.description: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP — browser automation, E2E testing, accessibility inspection. Use to visually verify UI after changes, write and run E2E tests, and debug layout/interaction issues.
